_comment: Manually maintained run + queue registry. update_dashboard.py merges this with live GPU probes into docs/assets/dashboard.json.

runs.what: StructMamba PEMS04/07/08 grid: 4 horizons x 3 seeds, canonical TSLib protocol
runs.progress: PEMS04 pred-12/24 done (0.0738 / 0.0919); pred-48/96 + PEMS07/08 remaining

runs.what: StructMamba PEMS03 grid: 4 horizons x 3 seeds
runs.progress: MSE 0.0635 / 0.0839 / 0.1247 / 0.1878 (pred-12/24/48/96) - beats S-Mamba published at every horizon

queue.what: Phase 1: self-run CrossFormer, S-Mamba, DMamba, PatchTST, TimesNet, DLinear under ONE canonical protocol (TSLib seq-96, 3 seeds) on PEMS03/04/07/08 x 4 horizons
queue.blocked_on: staging audit scripts; verify S-Mamba/DMamba code availability

queue.what: Phase 2 ablations: SE-ordered scan, hierarchical SE masks, SE-adaptive k (PEMS04+08, pred-12/96, 3 seeds per variant)
queue.target_boxes: free box after PEMS grid completes

queue.what: Protocol-inflation axis: rerun top-3 methods at their published configs to quantify config vs architecture effects
